name: Gourmet Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the pizza shell with olive oil.
2. Spread the pizza sauce over the shell.
3. Alternate slices of tomato and mozzarella around the pizza.
4. Place asparagus, basil, oregano, and garlic on top of the pizza.
5. Bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 10-12 minutes until golden and crisp.
6. Cut into quarters and place on a warm plate.
